data.title: 国际服Instagram关注数突破10万
data.summary: 10K Instagram Followers – Thank You Gift! 🎉 Blue Archive Official Instagram Reaches 10,000 Followers
data.body:
10K Instagram Followers – Thank You Gift!

🎉 Blue Archive Official Instagram Reaches 10,000 Followers! 💐

We’re thrilled to announce that the official Blue Archive Instagram account has reached 10,000 followers!
To express our heartfelt gratitude for all the love and support, we’ve prepared a special gift for all Senseis.
Regardless of whether you follow the account or not, please make sure to check your in-game mailbox during the event period to claim your reward!

🔹 Event Period
- July 17 (Thu) 6:00 PM – July 24 (Thu) 11:59 PM (UTC+9)

🔹 Event Details
- Log in to the game during the event period to receive your gift via the in-game mailbox.
(Mail is stored for 7 days. One-time reward per account.)

🔹 Event Rewards
🎁 Special thank-you gift
Pyroxene x300
Beautiful Bouquet x6

*You can find the reward in a mail titled “Schale’s gift has arrived” in your mailbox.

 ❗Note❗
∙ The details of this notice are subject to change, revision, or removal. Please stay tuned for updates.

![pic](images/timeline/CUdgxTgId3HNnB4cXHOzf7S6BR7dgsuf.png?t=1752986813227)
